appName.description: The extension name shown in the popup title and heading

autoActivateLabel.description: Label for the auto-activate toggle switch

initialPromptTitle.description: Title for the initial prompt section

sendAutomaticallyLabel.description: Label for the send automatically toggle

initialPromptPlaceholder.message: Enter a prompt to send automatically...
initialPromptPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the initial prompt textarea

savePromptButton.description: Button text to save the initial prompt

savedFeedback.description: Feedback shown after saving the prompt

footerDescription.message: Automatically replaces the video player with YouTube AI Chat
footerDescription.description: Footer text explaining the extension's purpose

defaultPrompt.description: Default text for the initial prompt textarea

toggleReaderLabel.description: Label on the toggle button when in Reader mode

toggleVideoLabel.description: Label on the toggle button when in Video mode
